title: distichlis spicata var. stricta
intro: Distichlis spicata var. stricta, also known as alkali grass or salt grass, is a perennial grass that grows in areas with high salt concentrations and is native to the Great Basin region of North America. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and treat skin conditions such as wounds and eczema, due to its antioxidant and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of alkali grass include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive health, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Alkali grass can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
